---
applyTo: 'src/app/**/*.tsx'
---

# SEO Rules

SEO is mandatory.

Every page must include:

- Title.
- Meta description.
- Canonical URL.
- Open Graph metadata.

Content requirements:

- Use one H1 per page.
- Maintain logical heading hierarchy.
- Use semantic HTML structure.

Internal linking:

- Follow internal linking strategy.
- Reuse approved anchor text patterns.
- Link relevant pages when appropriate.

Content requirements:

- Match target search intent.
- Match target keyword strategy.
- Avoid keyword stuffing.

Structured data requirements:

- Follow schema strategy documentation.
- Implement required schema when specified.

Image requirements:

- Use descriptive alt text.
- Avoid empty alt text unless decorative.

Before creating content:

- Read docs/seo/keyword-strategy.md.
- Read docs/seo/content-strategy.md.

Before approving implementation:

Verify:

- Metadata exists.
- Heading hierarchy is correct.
- Internal links exist.
- Structured data requirements are satisfied.
